title: Shield Rework
description: Shields now have health and can be broken by any item.
body:
![Shield Rework Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37b5044b9e2e9cf93252060b1299fb444032f5be_0.webp)

# 🤔 What is Shield Rework? Shield Rework changes how shields behave in Minecraft. Shields now have a health bar replacing the durability bar of the item. Hitting a shield will damage its health, and break the shield when it reaches 0. ### Set the gamerule `shield_damage_axe_only` to `true` to make only axes able to damage shields. # 💡 Features - Shields now have 80 hp. - Hitting it will deal damage the same way it would to any entity. - Certain items (axes only by default) deal more damage. - Its health is indicated by how "shattered" its texture looks. - Breaking a shield puts it on a 5s cooldown. - Its health can only be regenerated once the cooldown is elapsed. # 🛠️ Developers - Items doing more damage to shields are contained in the tag `extra_shield_damage`. - By default, it only contains the tag `minecraft:axes`. - Items in this tag deal `4.5` times more damage to shields. - The sources will always be contained alongside the mod's `jar`. # ❓ Q&A
Can I use this in my modpack? Yes.
I have an issue. Where can I report it? Issues can be reported in the help channel of the Discord.
Can you port this to Forge/Neoforge/Quilt? No. I only make mods for Fabric and won't port them for other mod loaders. If you want to make a branch of Legion for another loader, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
Can you backport the mod to version `x.xx`? No. I make mods for the latest version of the game and will not backport them. Similarly to Question 1, if you want to make a branch of Shield Rework for another version of the game, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
